"CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}], "description": "### Impact

An attacker who uses this vulnerability can craft a PDF which leads to long runtimes. This requires cross-reference streams with repeated malformed cross-reference streams.

### Patches

This has been fixed in [pypdf==6.14.0](https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/releases/tag/6.14.0).

### Workarounds

If you cannot upgrade yet, consider applying the changes from PR [#3887](https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/pull/3887).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00345, "percentile": 0.26546}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-55h5-xmcq-c37v", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-23T15:07:33Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-55h5-xmcq-c37v", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-55h5-xmcq-c37v"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-59937"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-07-08T18:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-07-23T15:07:33Z", "references": ["https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/security/advisories/GHSA-55h5-xmcq-c37v", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-59937", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/pull/3887", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/commit/b5fc5aa714f4b696fb9b1deaa35a9e4a4eb50dae", "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf/releases/tag/6.14.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-55h5-xmcq-c37v"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/py-pdf/pypdf/security-advisories/GHSA-55h5-xmcq-c37v", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/py-pdf/pypdf", "summary": "pypdf: Possible long runtimes for repeated malformed cross-reference entries ", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-23T15:07:34Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-55h5-xmcq-c37v", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.14.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "pypdf"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.14.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: pypdf: Possible long runtimes for repeated malformed cross-reference entries
